approval.note: Repository changes require diff-bound review and green CI before merge.

validation: Schauwerk validate passed on Python 3.11 and 3.12.
Local validation passed Ruff, registry checks and 342 tests.
Software and education pilots both use schauwerk-visual-grammar.v1 without sharing one identical layout.
Sensitivity scan found no private paths, private-key markers or GitHub token patterns.

verified_acceptance.grammar: Renderer-independent semantic tokens, provenance and six explicit non-colour state markers are versioned.
verified_acceptance.templates: Software, education, roadmap, timeline, presentation and public-summary template families are present.
verified_acceptance.accessibility: Contrast, reading order, text alternatives and text-plus-symbol state cues are fail-closed validated.
verified_acceptance.cross-pilot: Software and education renderers consume the same manifest while retaining distinct layouts.

metadata.outcome: The shared visual grammar and template families are implemented, tested and merged without provider mutation.

title: SW-008 — Consolidate visual grammar and templates
goal: Define recognisable semantic shapes, state markers, provenance, freshness, uncertainty, accessibility and layout templates.

acceptance.assertion: Semantic tokens and state markers are versioned and renderer-independent.
Software, education, roadmap, timeline, presentation and public-summary templates exist.
Contrast, text alternatives and non-colour state cues are validated.
At least two pilots use the same grammar without becoming visually identical.
